title: Evaluation Set Schema
description: Defines the structure and configuration of a evaluation set for evaluating model performance

UseCase.description:
Types of use cases for evaluation sets:
- question-answering: Evaluates ability to provide accurate answers to questions
- summarization: Tests text summarization capabilities
- translation: Assesses language translation accuracy
- code-generation: Evaluates code generation and modification abilities
- chat: Tests conversational abilities and dialogue management
- classification: Assesses text classification capabilities
- generation: Evaluates text generation abilities
- extraction: Tests information extraction capabilities
- other: Other evaluation set types not covered above

EvaluationSetType.description:
Types of evaluation set formats:
- input-only: evaluation set requires only input prompts
- input-output: evaluation set requires both input and output prompts
- multi-turn: evaluation set requires multiple input-output pairs

EvaluationSetFile.description: Represents a file associated with the evaluation set

filename.description: Name of the file with extension

file_path.description: Path to the file relative to evaluation set directory

file_size.description: Size of the file in bytes

evaluation set_id.description: Unique identifier for the evaluation set

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to this file

oneOf.description: The input text or question given to the agent
A sequence of inputs representing a multi-turn conversation

input_text.description: The input text/question given to the agent. Can be a single string or a list of strings for multi-turn interaction

expected_output.description: The expected output or answer from the agent

tags.description: Tags to categorize the example (may include difficulty)

explanation.description: Explanation of what this example is testing

difficulty.description: Difficulty level of the example (easy, medium, hard)

confidence.description: Confidence percentage for the expected output

id.description: Unique identifier for this evaluation set instance

name.description: Technical name of the evaluation set (machine-friendly)

label.description: Human-readable name of the evaluation set

description.description: Detailed description of the evaluation set's purpose and methodology

type.description: Format type of the evaluation set

use_case.description: Primary use case this evaluation set is designed to evaluate

agent_type.description: Type of agent this evaluation set is designed to evaluate

examples_count.description: Total number of examples in the evaluation set

files.description: Files associated with this evaluation set for evaluation

examples.description: Examples associated with this evaluation set

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this evaluation set was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to this evaluation set

metadata.description: Additional metadata about the evaluation set

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering evaluation sets

source.description: Source or origin of the evaluation set data

license.description: License under which the evaluation set is distributed
